message:
feat(fcp-host): add config snapshot, validate, apply, and rollback RPC methods

Implements get_config_snapshot(), config_revisions(), validate_config(),
apply_config(), and rollback_config() on HostAdminStateStore. All methods
support optimistic concurrency via expected_active_revision_id guards.

Config apply and rollback create new revisions (append-only history) with
full audit trail. Validate returns structured diffs without mutation.
Adds current_sanitized_config() helper for extracting sanitized config
from ConnectorAdminState.

17 new tests covering snapshots, revision history, validation with
stale-revision detection, apply with concurrency guards, rollback to
previous revisions, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
